item.title: Pocket Pc Text Messaging Tool [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Pocket Pc Text Messaging Tool [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: restorefiles
item.itunes:summary:
Pocket Pc Text Messaging Tool
(Chat & Messenging)
Text messaging software helps you to broadcast massive SMS to targeted marketing and also provides the facility to keeps in touch with their clients. Pocket pc to mobile phone text messaging tool is an innovative technique to create and send global SMS to all GSM or CDMA cell phone users by a single click. You can send text messages to the unlimited users at both national and international mobile networks regardless of their length or distance. There is no need of internet connection for sending promotional, job alerts, stock updates, invitations, greetings, requirement notifications etc. Message broadcasting software supports all Unicode supported languages like Hindi, English, Arabic, Hebrew, Chinese, Thai and Geek and send your SMS (short message service) to all of your relatives, employees, friends by just one instruction. By using this messaging software you can select you friends and employees and can easily send the text messages simultaneously to all of them by just one click. Software has the user friendly GUI facility and also supports all Smartphone, PDA, pocket pc devices such as Motorola i930, Motorola Q Motorola CN620 "MOD", Mitac Mio 8380, O2 Xphone, Motorola MPx200, Samsung Blackjack, O2 XDA Atom Motorola MPx220, O2 XDA IQ, Samsung SCH-i730 Pocket PC phone, Samsung SGH-i300, Palm Treo 700w, Microsoft/Flextronics "Peabody” etc. Features: *Software can send text messages from PDA or pocket pc to all GSM or CDMA cell phone users.*Tool can send messages at both national and international mobile networks without any internet connection.*Utility is basically used for sending job alerts, requirement notification, news updates, invitations etc.*Tool has the attractive GUI facility that helps users to operate it. *Tool provides full support of smart phone and pocket pc devices to send text messages.

[read more]
item.description:
Pocket Pc Text Messaging Tool
(Chat & Messenging)
Text messaging software helps you to broadcast massive SMS to targeted marketing and also provides the facility to keeps in touch with their clients. Pocket pc to mobile phone text messaging tool is an innovative technique to create and send global SMS to all GSM or CDMA cell phone users by a single click. You can send text messages to the unlimited users at both national and international mobile networks regardless of their length or distance. There is no need of internet connection for sending promotional, job alerts, stock updates, invitations, greetings, requirement notifications etc. Message broadcasting software supports all Unicode supported languages like Hindi, English, Arabic, Hebrew, Chinese, Thai and Geek and send your SMS (short message service) to all of your relatives, employees, friends by just one instruction. [read more]
item.content:encoded:
Pocket Pc Text Messaging Tool
(Chat & Messenging)
Text messaging software helps you to broadcast massive SMS to targeted marketing and also provides the facility to keeps in touch with their clients. Pocket pc to mobile phone text messaging tool is an innovative technique to create and send global SMS to all GSM or CDMA cell phone users by a single click. You can send text messages to the unlimited users at both national and international mobile networks regardless of their length or distance. There is no need of internet connection for sending promotional, job alerts, stock updates, invitations, greetings, requirement notifications etc. Message broadcasting software supports all Unicode supported languages like Hindi, English, Arabic, Hebrew, Chinese, Thai and Geek and send your SMS (short message service) to all of your relatives, employees, friends by just one instruction. By using this messaging software you can select you friends and employees and can easily send the text messages simultaneously to all of them by just one click. Software has the user friendly GUI facility and also supports all Smartphone, PDA, pocket pc devices such as Motorola i930, Motorola Q Motorola CN620 "MOD", Mitac Mio 8380, O2 Xphone, Motorola MPx200, Samsung Blackjack, O2 XDA Atom Motorola MPx220, O2 XDA IQ, Samsung SCH-i730 Pocket PC phone, Samsung SGH-i300, Palm Treo 700w, Microsoft/Flextronics "Peabody” etc. Features: *Software can send text messages from PDA or pocket pc to all GSM or CDMA cell phone users.*Tool can send messages at both national and international mobile networks without any internet connection.*Utility is basically used for sending job alerts, requirement notification, news updates, invitations etc.*Tool has the attractive GUI facility that helps users to operate it. *Tool provides full support of smart phone and pocket pc devices to send text messages.

[read more]

item.title: Convert SQL Server To MySQL [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Convert SQL Server To MySQL [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: restorefiles
item.itunes:summary:
Convert SQL Server To MySQL
(Utilities)
MSSQL to MySQL database conversion software converts MSSQL database in MySQL even converted database is stored at new location or overwrite the existing database. MSSQL to MySQL database conversion utility supports all version of MySQL and MSSQL database server. MSSQL to MySQL record migration software supports all Windows operating system like windows11, windows10, windows8, windows7. MSSQL to MySQL database conversion software converts database within few minutes without any error. MSSQL to MySQL record conversion software provides graphical user interface. MSSQL to MySQL record migration utility provides full install and uninstall support. MSSQL to MySQL database conversion software supports all default value constraints including unique, primary key constraint, secondary key constraint, null value and indexes with necessary attributes. MSSQL to MySQL table transfer software supports Unicode architecture. MSSQL to MySQL record migration software migrates MSSQL database format to MySQL format without changing in source file. MSSQL to MySQL database conversion software is easy to install and fast utility. MSSQL to MySQL database conversion software supports all types of database schema. MSSQL to MySQL database conversion software maintains database integrity.Features:*MSSQL to MySQL database conversion software converts Microsoft SQL to MySQL database format without changing in source file.*MSSQL to MySQL record migration software supports all data type and attributes of MSSQL and MySQL database server. *MSSQL to MySQL table conversion software converts entire or selected table record of Microsoft SQL to MySQL quickly within few minutes without any error.*MSSQL to MySQL record migration utility converts data even tables are stored at new location or overwrite the existing MySQL database.

[read more]
item.description:
Convert SQL Server To MySQL
(Utilities)
MSSQL to MySQL database conversion software converts MSSQL database in MySQL even converted database is stored at new location or overwrite the existing database. [read more]

MSSQL to MySQL database conversion software converts database within few minutes without any error. MSSQL to MySQL record conversion software provides graphical user interface. MSSQL to MySQL record migration utility provides full install and uninstall support. MSSQL to MySQL database conversion software supports all default value constraints including unique, primary key constraint, secondary key constraint, null value and indexes with necessary attributes. MSSQL to MySQL table transfer software supports Unicode architecture. MSSQL to MySQL record migration software migrates MSSQL database format to MySQL format without changing in source file. MSSQL to MySQL database conversion software is easy to install and fast utility. MSSQL to MySQL database conversion software supports all types of database schema. MSSQL to MySQL database conversion software maintains database integrity.Features:*MSSQL to MySQL database conversion software converts Microsoft SQL to MySQL database format without changing in source file.*MSSQL to MySQL record migration software supports all data type and attributes of MSSQL and MySQL database server. *MSSQL to MySQL table conversion software converts entire or selected table record of Microsoft SQL to MySQL quickly within few minutes without any error.*MSSQL to MySQL record migration utility converts data even tables are stored at new location or overwrite the existing MySQL database.

item.title: Removable Media Data Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Removable Media Data Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoverydigcam
item.itunes:summary:
Removable Media Data Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Removable Media Data Recovery Software is the only way to backup entire permanently lost files and folders due to shift+delete operation or hardware failure consequence. Pen drive data recovery application gives you right choice for those users who simply repair corrupted pictures, images, snapshots, audio, video clips from any type of digital camera removable storage in just fraction of seconds.

[read more]

Pen drive data recovery application gives you right choice for those users who simply repair corrupted pictures, images, snapshots, audio, video clips from any type of digital camera removable storage in just fraction of seconds.

Removable Media Data Recovery Software is the only way to backup entire permanently lost files and folders due to shift+delete operation or hardware failure consequence. Pen drive data recovery application gives you right choice for those users who simply repair corrupted pictures, images, snapshots, audio, video clips from any type of digital camera removable storage in just fraction of seconds.

[read more]

item.title: ToolsBaer EML to HTML Importer [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: ToolsBaer EML to HTML Importer [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: michaelgeorge
item.itunes:summary:
ToolsBaer EML to HTML Importer
(Utilities)
Users can easily and expertly convert EML to HTML files with the help of ToolsBaer EML to HTML Importer. This program takes into account the data's complete integrity and security. Bulk file conversion between Windows Live Mail files to HTML files is possible. EML files can be converted to HTML and attached files can be imported. The program offers the most straightforward user interface for successfully converting EML to HTML. This converter makes it simple to migrate EML to HTML extremely effectively, and since a great deal of professional solutions are safeguarded against hazards, there are no risks involved before or after conversion. Both professional and free methods are available for converting Windows Live Mail EML to HTML. Users are free to choose the method that best suits their needs. However, using a specialized tool such as ToolsBaer EML to HTML Importer is strongly advised. EML to HTML conversion is simple with the utility order. Windows 10, 7, XP, Vista, 8, 8.1, and 11 are all compatible with the program. Try this program's free sample version.

[read more]

item.title: Memory Stick File Rescue [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Memory Stick File Rescue [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: restorefiles
item.itunes:summary:
Memory Stick File Rescue
(Utilities)
Data Doctor Pen drive restoration tool restores deleted files folders from formatted thumb drive. Retrieval tool retrieves deleted word, excel, power point, access documents from corrupted memory stick. Utility recovers previously saved jpeg, jpg, bmp, gif, tiff, riff picture files missing digital images. Tool extracts corrupted audio, video, mp3 music songs, pictures, photo, clips, and snaps. Recovery software undeletes accidentally deleted doc, xls, mdb, ppt, txt file document. No any special technical skill is required to run this software tools provide a help option so that user retrieve their lost data with safe and non destructive way. Restoration utility has simple graphical user interface (GUI) so that user retrieve its required data easily. Before purchasing software company provides demo version of software for user to extract erased files folders. Restoration utility restores formatted inaccessible memory sticks data. Retrieval utility supports windows11, windows10, windows8, windows7.Features: *Data doctor pen drive data retrieval software is safe and non destructive utility to recover deleted memory stick data. *Tool retrieves data even pen drive is formatted or drive not formatted message displayed by windows operating system. *Restoration software recovers data from inaccessible memory stick or pen thumb drive. *Utility extracts jpeg, jpg, gif, tiff, png, bmp, riff images, pictures from corrupted thumb drive. *Software retrieves formatted pen drive doc, xls, ppt, mdb documents. *Recovery tool supports windows operating system like windows11, windows10, windows8, windows7. *Software provides inbuilt help menu so that user easily use the recovery utility.

[read more]
item.description:
Memory Stick File Rescue
(Utilities)
Data Doctor Pen drive restoration tool restores deleted files folders from formatted thumb drive. Retrieval tool retrieves deleted word, excel, power point, access documents from corrupted memory stick. Utility recovers previously saved jpeg, jpg, bmp, gif, tiff, riff picture files missing digital images. Tool extracts corrupted audio, video, mp3 music songs, pictures, photo, clips, and snaps. [read more]

Utility recovers previously saved jpeg, jpg, bmp, gif, tiff, riff picture files missing digital images. Tool extracts corrupted audio, video, mp3 music songs, pictures, photo, clips, and snaps. Restoration utility has simple graphical user interface (GUI) so that user retrieve its required data easily. [read more]

item.title: NTFS HDD Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: NTFS HDD Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: restorefiles
item.itunes:summary:
NTFS HDD Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Vista NTFS partition recovery software will help you to retrieve data from formatted, corrupt or damaged NTFS partition. Restoration application support recovery of damaged partition formatted disk drive and corrupted root table entry. Windows NTFS data undelete utility restore lost data when you accidentally format the disk. NTFS NTFS5 unformat utility restore lost files folders, pictures, photos, office document, audio video songs and movies clips. It can rescue virus infected root directory or master boot record such as MBR or DBR. Windows vista data salvage tool capable to retrieve all Microsoft office documents like word (.doc), power point (.ppt), excel (.xls), access (.mdb), outlook (.pst), etc which are deleted through recycle bin after pressing (shift + del) key combination or removed from DOS command prompt window, unexpected shut down , system crashed or some other technical problems. NTFS data recovery software comes with disk imaging option which helps to create image file, such file can be processed like a regular disk. Application has able to saved recover file or folder to any specific location or any remote FTP location. Utility is design to run on all Microsoft windows based operating system like windows11, windows10, windows8 and all version of vista.Special feature:* Tool has enhanced new intuitive interface with several themes and user friendly help option. * Supports to recover partition from NTFS and NTFS5 file systems.* Containing file filter feature which help to recover specific files with specific extensions.* Recover data even if the data is unrecognizable by the Windows operating system.* Searching option to search particular files from the list of recovered data.

[read more]
item.description:
NTFS HDD Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Vista NTFS partition recovery software will help you to retrieve data from formatted, corrupt or damaged NTFS partition. Restoration application support recovery of damaged partition formatted disk drive and corrupted root table entry. Windows NTFS data undelete utility restore lost data when you accidentally format the disk. NTFS NTFS5 unformat utility restore lost files folders, pictures, photos, office document, audio video songs and movies clips. It can rescue virus infected root directory or master boot record such as MBR or DBR. Windows vista data salvage tool capable to retrieve all Microsoft office documents like word (.doc), power point (.ppt), excel (.xls), access (.mdb), outlook (.pst), etc which are deleted through recycle bin after pressing (shift + del) key combination or removed from DOS command prompt window, unexpected shut down , system crashed or some other technical problems. NTFS data recovery software comes with disk imaging option which helps to create image file, such file can be processed like a regular disk. Application has able to saved recover file or folder to any specific location or any remote FTP location. Utility is design to run on all Microsoft windows based operating system like windows11, windows10, windows8 and all version of vista.Special feature:* Tool has enhanced new intuitive interface with several themes and user friendly help option. * Supports to recover partition from NTFS and NTFS5 file systems.* Containing file filter feature which help to recover specific files with specific extensions.* Recover data even if the data is unrecognizable by the Windows operating system.* Searching option to search particular files from the list of recovered data.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
NTFS HDD Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Vista NTFS partition recovery software will help you to retrieve data from formatted, corrupt or damaged NTFS partition. Restoration application support recovery of damaged partition formatted disk drive and corrupted root table entry. Windows NTFS data undelete utility restore lost data when you accidentally format the disk. NTFS NTFS5 unformat utility restore lost files folders, pictures, photos, office document, audio video songs and movies clips. It can rescue virus infected root directory or master boot record such as MBR or DBR. Windows vista data salvage tool capable to retrieve all Microsoft office documents like word (.doc), power point (.ppt), excel (.xls), access (.mdb), outlook (.pst), etc which are deleted through recycle bin after pressing (shift + del) key combination or removed from DOS command prompt window, unexpected shut down , system crashed or some other technical problems. NTFS data recovery software comes with disk imaging option which helps to create image file, such file can be processed like a regular disk. Application has able to saved recover file or folder to any specific location or any remote FTP location. Utility is design to run on all Microsoft windows based operating system like windows11, windows10, windows8 and all version of vista.Special feature:* Tool has enhanced new intuitive interface with several themes and user friendly help option. * Supports to recover partition from NTFS and NTFS5 file systems.* Containing file filter feature which help to recover specific files with specific extensions.* Recover data even if the data is unrecognizable by the Windows operating system.* Searching option to search particular files from the list of recovered data.

[read more]

item.title: Windows Partition Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Windows Partition Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoverydigcam
item.itunes:summary:
Windows Partition Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Company presents Windows Partition Recovery Software from website www.data-recovery-digital-camera.com which facilitates to repair and rescue damaged files and folders from damaged FAT partition hard disk removable storage. Data retrieval utility supports windows operating system like Windows 11,Win 10, Win 8, Win 7 etc to rescue entire missing and deleted data.

[read more]
item.description:

Company presents Windows Partition Recovery Software from website www.data-recovery-digital-camera.com which facilitates to repair and rescue damaged files and folders from damaged FAT partition hard disk removable storage. Data retrieval utility supports windows operating system like Windows 11,Win 10, Win 8, Win 7 etc to rescue entire missing and deleted data.

Data retrieval utility supports windows operating system like Windows 11,Win 10, Win 8, Win 7 etc to rescue entire missing and deleted data.

item.title: Pocket PC Device Forensic Tool [Security]
item.itunes:title: Pocket PC Device Forensic Tool [Security]
item.itunes:author: restorefiles
item.itunes:summary:
Pocket PC Device Forensic Tool
(Security)
Mobile phone forensic application examines general information of all Windows based Pocket PC and PDA mobile device. Pocket PC investigation tool shows IMEI, IMSI number and manufacturer name of any PDA mobile phone. Utility shows all read/unread text messages and phonebook details of Windows based Pocket PC. PDA surveillance application displays complete mobile information and generates detailed report in text or HTML format of all examined information. Pocket PC device forensic tool shows phonebook/contact numbers, task and appointment details of PDA mobile phone with correct date and time. PDA investigation tool is compatible with all latest versions of Windows operating system and provides support of graphical user interface (GUI) which assists technical as well as non technical users in operating the software. Application shows hardware configuration and OS registry details of Windows based Pocket PC. PDA investigation utility examines information like stored files, database records and other mobile phone information etc. Pocket PC device forensic tool supports various PDA mobile devices including orange myS-7 Smartphone and orange SPV C500 Smartphone etc.Features:*PDA surveillance utility extracts text files, database records and OS registry details of any Windows based mobile phone.*Pocket PC device forensic tool displays complete mobile information (IMEI, model number, manufacturer name) and generates detailed report in text or HTML format.*Mobile phone forensic software provides support of wizard style GUI interface and efficiently works under all major versions of Windows operating system like windows11, windows10, windows8, windows7 etc.

[read more]
item.description:
Pocket PC Device Forensic Tool
(Security)
Mobile phone forensic application examines general information of all Windows based Pocket PC and PDA mobile device. Pocket PC investigation tool shows IMEI, IMSI number and manufacturer name of any PDA mobile phone. Utility shows all read/unread text messages and phonebook details of Windows based Pocket PC. PDA surveillance application displays complete mobile information and generates detailed report in text or HTML format of all examined information. Pocket PC device forensic tool shows phonebook/contact numbers, task and appointment details of PDA mobile phone with correct date and time. PDA investigation tool is compatible with all latest versions of Windows operating system and provides support of graphical user interface (GUI) which assists technical as well as non technical users in operating the software. Application shows hardware configuration and OS registry details of Windows based Pocket PC. [read more]

Pocket PC Device Forensic Tool
(Security)
Mobile phone forensic application examines general information of all Windows based Pocket PC and PDA mobile device. Pocket PC investigation tool shows IMEI, IMSI number and manufacturer name of any PDA mobile phone. Utility shows all read/unread text messages and phonebook details of Windows based Pocket PC. PDA surveillance application displays complete mobile information and generates detailed report in text or HTML format of all examined information. Pocket PC device forensic tool shows phonebook/contact numbers, task and appointment details of PDA mobile phone with correct date and time. PDA investigation tool is compatible with all latest versions of Windows operating system and provides support of graphical user interface (GUI) which assists technical as well as non technical users in operating the software. Application shows hardware configuration and OS registry details of Windows based Pocket PC. PDA investigation utility examines information like stored files, database records and other mobile phone information etc. Pocket PC device forensic tool supports various PDA mobile devices including orange myS-7 Smartphone and orange SPV C500 Smartphone etc.Features:*PDA surveillance utility extracts text files, database records and OS registry details of any Windows based mobile phone.*Pocket PC device forensic tool displays complete mobile information (IMEI, model number, manufacturer name) and generates detailed report in text or HTML format.*Mobile phone forensic software provides support of wizard style GUI interface and efficiently works under all major versions of Windows operating system like windows11, windows10, windows8, windows7 etc.

item.title: Data Recovery for FAT [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Data Recovery for FAT [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoverydigcam
item.itunes:summary:
Data Recovery for FAT
(Utilities)
Professional FAT data recovery software easily restores your data from HDD and also saves your time, effort and money by using GUI interface. Data Recovery for FAT program does not require any technical skill for data regaining from FAT 32 file system. Revival tool recovers data even if “Drive not formatted” error message is displayed on your computer screen.

[read more]
item.description:
Data Recovery for FAT
(Utilities)
Professional FAT data recovery software easily restores your data from HDD and also saves your time, effort and money by using GUI interface. Data Recovery for FAT program does not require any technical skill for data regaining from FAT 32 file system. Revival tool recovers data even if “Drive not formatted” error message is displayed on your computer screen.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:

Professional FAT data recovery software easily restores your data from HDD and also saves your time, effort and money by using GUI interface. Data Recovery for FAT program does not require any technical skill for data regaining from FAT 32 file system. Revival tool recovers data even if “Drive not formatted” error message is displayed on your computer screen.

[read more]

item.title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:author: francoisj
item.itunes:summary:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.description:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
